revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name= Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine |Image= [[File:Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine.jpg|300px]] |Location= {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}, {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, Yamamoto aza Yato 1 |Coordinates= {{Coordinates2degrees|35|12|27.88|N|138|37|45.12|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities= Emperor Ōjin
[[Minamoto no Mitsunaka]] (traditionally) |Shrine Rank= Former Village Shrine |Established= |Annual Festival= September 9 }} '''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine. == Origins == According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of [[Yamamoto Kansuke]], enshrined the deity. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm Fujinomiya City] == See Also == * [[Yamamoto Kansuke]] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Hachiman Shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fujinomiya]] [[Category:Former Village Shrines of Japan]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Fujinomiya]] [[ja:山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamamoto Hachimangū}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:defautsort]] [[Category:fix the O]]{{DEFAULTSORTYamamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)}}[[category:fix the O]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:defautsort]] [[Category:fix the O]]{{DEFAULTSORTYamamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)}}[[category:fix the O]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:refresh]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:Yamamoto Hachimangū]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[ja:%E5%B1%B1%E6%9C%AC%E5%85%AB%E5%B9%A1%E5%AE%AE (%E5%AF%8C%E5%A3%AB%E5%AE%AE%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:山本八幡宮]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/山本八幡宮]]

{{Shrine |Name= Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine |Image= [[File:Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine.jpg|300px]] |Location= {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}, {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, Yamamoto aza Yato 1 |Coordinates= {{Coordinates2degrees|35|12|27.88|N|138|37|45.12|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities= Emperor Ōjin
[[Minamoto no Mitsunaka]] (traditionally) |Shrine Rank= Former Village Shrine |Established= |Annual Festival= September 9 }} '''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine. == Origins == According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]], enshrined the deity. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm Fujinomiya City] == See Also == * [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Hachiman Shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fujinomiya]] [[Category:Former Village Shrines of Japan]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Fujinomiya]] [[Category:New pages]][[ja:山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)]] {{citation needed|Yamamoto Hachimangū}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Yamamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)}}[[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:Default sort converted to citation needed]] {{citation needed|Yamamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)}}[[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:refresh]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:Yamamoto Hachimangū]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:bump 1-20 (2)]] [[Category:New pages]][[ja:%E5%B1%B1%E6%9C%AC%E5%85%AB%E5%B9%A1%E5%AE%AE (%E5%AF%8C%E5%A3%AB%E5%AE%AE%E5%B8%82)]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:bump 1-25]] [[ja:山本八幡宮]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/山本八幡宮]]

{{Shrine |name= Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine.jpg|300px]] |location= {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}, {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, Yamamoto aza Yato 1 |coordinates= {{coordinates2degrees|35|12|27.88|N|138|37|45.12|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities= Emperor Ōjin
[[Minamoto no Mitsunaka]] (traditionally) |type= Former Village Shrine |Established= |festival= September 9 }} '''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine. == Origins == According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]], enshrined the deity. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm Fujinomiya City] == See Also == * [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Hachiman Shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Minamoto no Mitsunaka]] (traditionally) |type= Former Village Shrine |Established= |festival= September 9 }} '''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine. == Origins == According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]], enshrined the deity. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). {{Shrine |name= Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image= [[File:Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine.jpg|300px]] |location= {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}, {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, Yamamoto aza Yato 1 |coordinates= {{coordinates2degrees|35|12|27.88|N|138|37|45.12|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity= Emperor Ōjin
[[Minamoto no Mitsunaka]] (traditionally) |type= Former Village Shrine |Established= |festival= September 9 }} '''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine. == Origins == According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]], enshrined the deity. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm Fujinomiya City] == See Also == * [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:Hachiman Shrines]] [[Category:Shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Minamoto no Mitsunaka]] (traditionally) |type= Former Village Shrine |Established= |festival= September 9 }} '''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in {{ill|Fujinomiya|ja|富士宮市}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|ja|静岡県}}. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine. == Origins == According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]], enshrined the deity. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 山本八幡宮 |画像= [[ファイル:Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine.jpg|300px]] |所在地= [[静岡県]][[富士宮市]]山本字谷戸1 |位置= {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|12|27.88|N|138|37|45.12|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神= 応神天皇
[[源満仲]]（伝） |社格= 旧村社 |創建= |例祭= 9月9日 }} '''山本八幡宮'''（やまもとはちまんぐう）は[[静岡県]][[富士宮市]]にある[[神社]]である。多田八幡宮(とうどのはちまんぐう)ともいう名称もある。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は村社。 == 起源 == [[山本勘助]]の曽祖父である吉野貞倫が勧請したのが始まりと伝えられる。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm 富士宮市] == 関連項目 == *[[山本勘助]] {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまもとはちまんくう ふしのみやし}} [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:富士宮市の歴史]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:富士宮市の建築物]]

[[:en:Minamoto no Mitsunaka|Minamoto no Mitsunaka]] (traditionally) |type= Former Village Shrine |Established= |festival= September 9 |prefecture= {{ill|Fujinomiya|qid=Q496072}} }} '''Yamamoto Hachiman Shrine''' (山本八幡宮, Yamamoto Hachimangū) is a [[shrine]] located in [[:en:Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|Fujinomiya]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]]. It is also referred to as '''Tōdō Hachiman Shrine''' (多田八幡宮). Under the [[Modern shrine Ranking system]], it was classified as a Village Shrine. == Origins == According to tradition, the shrine was established when Yoshino Sadatomi, the great-grandfather of [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]], enshrined the deity. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [http://www.city.fujinomiya.shizuoka.jp/kankou/kansuke/kansuke.htm Fujinomiya City] == See Also == * [[:en:Yamamoto_Kansuke_(general)|Yamamoto Kansuke]] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)|version=81579773|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:History of Fujinomiya]] [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] }} [[sn:User:Immanuelle/山本八幡宮]] [[ja:山本八幡宮 (富士宮市)]] [[ja:%E5%B1%B1%E6%9C%AC%E5%85%AB%E5%B9%A1%E5%AE%AE (%E5%AF%8C%E5%A3%AB%E5%AE%AE%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:山本八幡宮]] [[sn:Yamamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)]] [[sn:amamoto Hachimangū (Fujinomiya City)]] [[Category:Hachiman shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Fujinomiya]] [[Category:History of Fujinomiya]] [[Category:Son-sha in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:pages with former wikipedia userpage links]] {{wikidata link|Q11468881}}
